images.why: Single swan on pastel pre-dawn lake. Smooth pink/violet sky, smooth water middle band. Painterly.
Misty lake with bare trees, soft reflection in calm water. Gentle and atmospheric.

[v3] Banff valley at dawn — layered hazy-gold mountain silhouettes receding into amber atmospheric haze. Dark cliff anchors the upper-LEFT (where the briefing-greeting lands on desktop) and dark conifers fill the bottom edge. Top-half has a dark cliff mass instead of uniform bright sky.

[v3] Tatoosh range at first light — alpenglow peaks middle, dense dark conifer forest fills the lower half, and a SMOOTH pale-pink sky on top (no busy cloud wisps). Smooth gradient sky is more text-shadow-friendly than the previous wispy attempts; dark forest carries content cards.
Misty valley filled with fir trees in layered fog. Moody, gray-green, atmospheric.
Foggy bare pine forest in monochrome gray. Calm, painterly, no bright spots.

Textbook painterly layered ridges — peach-to-violet gradient sky, indigo silhouetted hills receding in atmospheric haze. The blue mid-band protects glass UI; the warm sky lives above the briefing area where wash sampling ignores it.

dawn/packed.note: Still slim — editorial pool for pre-dawn intimate forest is weak. Added one new addition to bring slot from 1 → 2.

images.why: Atmospheric pre-dawn fog through pine silhouettes. Enveloping, calming.
Single autumn-orange beech branch in soft bokeh forest. Intimate, painterly, hand-of-the-photographer feel. Cool blue-gray background anchors the warm leaves — packed mood without drama.
Vast open prairie under clean gradient teal sky. Maximum breathing room.
Layered mountain silhouettes with deep dark-blue ridge anchoring the left, opening to luminous peach sky right. Dark-left protects nav text.
Wabi-sabi minimalist field — uniform gray-green foreground, soft fog horizon dissolves into pale sky. Hyper-restrained, lots of breathing room. Glass UI floats cleanly.
Foggy meadow with a clean horizontal treeline mid-frame and golden-tan grass foreground. Soft sepia palette, very Andrew Wyeth. Vertical layering survives both crops.
Silky fog waves cascading over redwood forest at sunrise. Warm orange sky, blue-grey fog mid-band, dark conifer silhouettes anchor the left.
Lenticular streaked clouds over fog-wrapped hilltop with single tree silhouette. Painterly, layered, dark conifer treeline on left.

Pale-monochrome misty lake — bare-tree silhouettes on left, reeds in foreground, distant treeline dissolving into haze. Cool-gray painterly winter morning. Glass UI reads on the soft uniform mid-band.

Duffey Lake mountain valley with mirror reflection. Cool teal water, snow-streaked mountain in distance, dark conifer walls left/right frame the composition. Strong vertical interest survives portrait crop.
Misty forest path with dark arching trunks framing a vanishing point. Crisp, atmospheric, enveloping.
Misty tropical forest with double-canopy layering. Atmospheric, intimate, calm.
Snow-laden conifer forest with first-light peach alpenglow across the top. Painterly, intimate, enveloping pattern fills the frame. Dense detail = quintessential packed tier.
Foggy Norwegian pine forest — dark conifers anchor the bottom two-thirds, soft white fog drifts through mid-band. Calm, enveloping, perfect glass-UI base.
Warm terracotta desert fading to luminous salt flat under clean pale-blue sky.
Open landscape with sandy-rose tones. Minimal and unhurried.

[v2] High-plains golden grass foreground with a single dark thundercloud anvil over distant hills, pale lavender afternoon sky. Painterly Big Sky Country mood. Cloud anchors the mid-band for glass UI; foreground grass adds warm depth.
Wyoming-style plain with dramatic cumulus cloudscape — gold-sienna field foreground, dark mountain band, big sky stratocumulus drift overhead. Adds clouds to the afternoon/light vocabulary.
Golden meadow with pale-blue top third. Cohesive warm-amber middle wash.
Balanced rolling landscape with warm afternoon clarity.

[v3] Layered rolling hills receding into rain showers under a heavy storm-cloud ceiling — top half is dark navy cloud, bottom is layered dark green ridges, mid-band has soft rain curtains catching warm horizon light. Painterly, deeply natural landscape, dark top for briefing readability.
Golden-lit ridges with mist-filled valleys, layered hills receding into haze. Warm earth-tone palette pairs cleanly with existing afternoon/moderate picks. Foreground rocks anchor the bottom.
Tall old-growth trunks rising into misty green canopy. Grounded, enveloping understory.
Dense fern-and-moss forest floor with warm afternoon light. Intimate, rooted.
Maidenhair fern in deep saturated green — abstract leaf-pattern fills the frame. Dark, intimate, contemplative. Perfect glass-UI base.
Hosta-leaf ribbed texture in sage and silver-green — abstract, painterly, almost fabric-like. A more designerly, restrained take on the packed tier than the literal forest options.
Warm amber-peach sky over glassy open horizon, minimal grass silhouettes.
Open golden-hour horizon with airy warm light.
Lofoten fjord islands with glowing peaks, soft rainbow arch, painterly cloud bank. Single subject (island), warm-amber peaks on cool water. Stunning national-park calm.
Bay at golden hour with palm-frond silhouettes framing the view — distant hills, calm sea, warm amber wash. Cinematic, Mediterranean, intimate-airy mix.
Painterly warm mauve and rose layered alpine ridges with pale-gold (not white) sky.
Deep amber-orange glow saturates the frame, layered mountain silhouettes, classic golden-hour warmth.
Painterly wheat field — golden top half, sage-green bottom, almost an oil-painting gradient. Calm, no horizon, abstract enough to read as wash on iOS.
Backlit wheat heads with warm sun-flare upper-right corner. Painterly, intimate, golden. Sun is corner-contained so it doesn't fight central content cards.
Misty layered forest at golden hour with warm amber glow in smooth mid-band.
Autumn forest path with golden-amber haze and fallen leaves. Intimate, painterly.
Aerial dense evergreen forest with diagonal warm-gold light wash from upper-right. Painterly abstract — pattern, depth, and a single light direction. Enveloping pattern fits packed tier.

Wildflowers backlit by golden hour — bokeh cornflowers, peonies, soft sun glow upper-right. Painterly, romantic, garden-scale intimacy. A different vocabulary for packed (botanical close-up vs. forest).
Above-clouds twilight, smooth pale blush-to-pink sky, periwinkle blue middle band.
Calm pastel evening lake with single distant subject. Airy and unhurried.
Cobalt-to-amber post-sunset over glassy sea, single dark island silhouette dead-center. Iconic blue-hour gradient. Soft and minimal.
35mm film sailboats on calm sea at dusk — lavender-pink horizon, turquoise water, yellow buoy specks for scale. Hush, breath, very film-photo intimate.
Post-sunset blue hour over Norwegian fjord — cool teal water, layered snow-capped ridges.
Cool blue twilight landscape with layered atmosphere. Calm post-sunset mood.
Cool-blue alpine peaks at dusk with cloud bands clinging to ridges. Painterly atmospheric layering, deep navy foreground rocks. Quietly dramatic, glass-safe.
Layered indigo mountain silhouettes against orange-to-violet gradient sky. Iconic painterly post-sunset. Cool foreground hills anchor lower-half for glass UI; warm sky lives above the briefing area.
Deeply tonal blue-teal post-sunset seascape, single clean horizon.
Coastal evening with twilight mood. Cool, calm, intimate.
Dark forested cliff overlooking churning sea at dusk, soft amber horizon. Moody, intimate, deep tonal range. Classic packed-tier 'sit with me' coastal.
Beach at sunset — wet sand mirrors dark-cloud sky and a single sun nub on horizon. Painterly long-exposure waves. Saturated rose and slate. Moody-intimate.
Crescent moon over deep teal mountain silhouette. Smooth dark sky, single calm focal point.
Milky Way as one coherent vertical band over the Matterhorn with mirror reflection.
Vestrahorn (Iceland) aurora — green-magenta northern lights over silhouetted alpine peaks, dark beach foreground, single shooting star. Bold but balanced; protects glass UI with dark foreground.
Mirror-still alpine lake reflects starry sky and ridge silhouettes. Calm and very dark — exactly the 'breathing room' the light tier asks for.

night/moderate.note: Editorial pool for moonlit-mountain-lake was thin. Picked the two most atmospheric/painterly available; both lean dusk rather than full night.

images.why: Deep blue twilight with layered dark mountains, glowing alpenglow peaks.
Deep teal starry night over snow-capped alpine peaks. Dark navy mid-band — briefing prose reads cleanly.

[v2] Monument Valley at night — full starfield top, milky-way streak, moonlit red-rust mesa silhouettes layered across the middle, dark foreground floor. Iconic, painterly, dark mid-band reads cleanly under briefing prose. Replaces the Banff god-rays which were too bright for briefing.

Antique hand-coloured photograph from Te Papa — painterly pink-yellow stormy clouds over dark mountains and water. Reads as art-piece, completely unique among the otherwise-photographic catalog. Wash will be muted rose.
Deep navy starfield top third with monochromatic blue-black middle band.
Intimate night scene with deep cool tones. Enveloping, calm.
Star trails over a single snow-capped peak — long-exposure diagonal streaks fill the sky, dark mountain silhouette anchors the bottom. Painterly, cosmic, calm.
Milky Way arch over a sea of cloud with mountain peaks emerging at dawn-edge — warm horizon line, cool cosmic sky. One of the most cinematic night shots in the editorial set.
